advantages: Zero setup — runs in the browser with many ML libraries pre-installed.
Free GPU/TPU access for prototyping (within quotas).
Easy sharing and collaboration via Google Drive.
Built-in Secrets keep API keys out of the notebook.
disadvantages: Ephemeral runtime: filesystem and pip installs reset on disconnect.
Usage limits and variable hardware availability on the free tier.
Idle timeouts can interrupt long-running jobs.
Less control over the environment than a local/managed setup.
